# CEO Assistant — Claude Code Skill

> An AI Chief of Staff for any CEO. Connects to HubSpot, Stripe, GA4, QuickBooks, Salesforce, Notion, Slack, and 14 more tools. Covers 21 business domains. Alerts on 25+ red flags. Adapts to CEO background.

## What this is

CEO Assistant is a Claude Code skill — a pre-built instruction set that gives Claude specialized expertise in business operations, finance, sales, marketing, and executive decision-making. It remembers the user's company context across sessions and connects to live business data sources via MCP (Model Context Protocol).

## Install

```bash
claude skills install https://github.com/Claudefarid/claude-ceo-skill
```

## Core capabilities

- Company memory: stores CEO name, company stage, metrics, goals, team, and region persistently
- 21 business domains: finance, sales, marketing, customer success, HR, operations, product, investor relations, meetings, communications, strategy, OKRs, legal, PR, hiring, competitive intelligence, weekly digest, M&A, exit planning, international expansion
- 25+ red flag alerts: triggered automatically on finance, sales, marketing, HR, operations, and M&A data
- Regional benchmarks: North America, South Asia, Southeast Asia, Middle East, UK and Europe
- CEO background adaptation: adjusts explanation depth for technical, sales, finance, first-time, and general executive backgrounds
- 20 live integrations: QuickBooks, Xero, Stripe, HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, GA4, Google Ads, Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, PostHog, Mixpanel, Intercom, Zendesk, Google Sheets, Google Drive, Gmail, Notion, Slack, Shopify

## Who uses this

CEOs, founders, and executives at startups and growth-stage companies who use Claude Code and want AI-assisted business intelligence without switching between dashboards.

## Key questions this skill answers

- How is my business performing this week?
- Is my burn rate and runway healthy?
- Which customers are at risk of churning?
- How do I prepare for my board meeting?
- What should I pay a VP of Sales at my stage?
- How do we beat our top competitor?
- We received an acquisition offer — what do I do?
- How do we expand into a new market?
- What does this P&L report mean?
- How do I connect HubSpot to get live data?

## Technical details

- Type: Claude Code skill (SKILL.md format)
- Reference files: 29
- MCP integrations: 20 tools with step-by-step setup guides
- Benchmark sets: 5 regional, 4 industry types
- License: MIT
- Repository: https://github.com/Claudefarid/claude-ceo-skill

## Related topics

Claude Code, Claude skill, AI chief of staff, CEO AI assistant, business intelligence, HubSpot MCP, GA4 MCP, Stripe MCP, startup tools, executive assistant AI, MCP server, Model Context Protocol
